title: PJ's Custom Hearts
description: A set of minimalist custom hearts made as a first project.
body:
# Welcome to PJ's Custom Hearts!
In this pack you will find custom, more minimalist, textures for your survival and hardcore hearts for the times you just need, small, pinkish-red hearts on your screen at all times. (Also affects hearts for mounts!)
> Also check out:
> - [PJ's Custom Hunger Bar](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/pjs-custom-hunger-bar)
> - [PJ's Custom Armor Bar](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/pjs-custom-armor-bar)
> - PJ's Custom Hats - WIP
